title: verbascum × baumgartnerianum
intro: Verbascum × baumgartnerianum, also known as Baumgartner's mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the mullein genus, Verbascum, combining the characteristics of Verbascum chaixii and Verbascum lychnitis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the leaves and flowers, which contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Verbascum × baumgartnerianum include reducing inflammation, calming digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to address various health concerns.
